heading: Create new profile
intro: Create a health profile for yourself, or a caregiver profile for someone else, for example an elderly parent or child. You can add all details later.

form.type-hint: A caregiver profile documents another person's health, for example an elderly parent or child.
form.managed-by-hint: Stored to indicate who manages this profile.
form.version-hint: Semver format recommended. Incremented on future changes.
